title: Bridge Essay: Mother-Infant Brain-to-Brain Synchrony Patterns Reflect Caregiving Profiles.

**Mother-Infant Brain-to-Brain Synchrony Patterns Reflect Caregiving Profiles.**. Biology.. PMID: 36829560. DOI: 10.3390/biology12020284. Biobehavioral synchrony, the coordination of physiological and behavioral signals between mother and infant during social contact, tunes the child'sbrain to the social world.
